name: Zig Compiler
description: Installs the Zig programming language (https://ziglang.org/) globally.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has the Zig compiler pre-installed globally. Use `zig build` to compile projects with a `build.zig` file, `zig test <file>` to run tests, and `zig fmt <file>` to format source files. The Zig version is pinned for reproducibility.
